channel.title: AI Co-Engineer Guide
channel.description: Practical patterns for building AI agents that actually feel like coworkers. Not chatbots. Not assistants. Co-engineers.

item.title: Professional Niche Strategies
item.description: Advanced techniques trending among top AI developers for managing living architecture maps and maintaining state across sessions.

item.title: Protocols Over Placebos
item.description: Stop telling your AI it's a '10x Lead Engineer'. Role-prompting is a placebo. Here is how to use concrete execution protocols instead.

item.title: File Structure & Symlinks
item.description: How to organize your AI context files so they actually work across Cursor, Claude, and Github Copilot without turning your repo into a messy junk drawer.

item.title: The User Profile Pattern
item.description: Build a persistent memory layer that teaches your AI who you are, what you care about, and how you work. It learns over time without you manually updating it.

item.title: Quantifying AI Effectiveness
item.description: How to measure whether your AI setup is actually saving you time or just creating technical debt.

item.title: The AI Autopsy: Reverse Engineering Legacy Systems
item.description: How to leverage an AI Co-Engineer to map out undocumented logic and parse unreadable dependencies.

item.title: Self-Improving Rules
item.description: Static rules go stale. Here's a pattern where your AI proposes its own rule updates when it notices recurring patterns in your codebase.

item.title: Skills Over Prompts
item.description: Prompts are disposable. Skills are reusable, testable, and they compound over time. Here's how to build a skill system that makes your AI get better at specific tasks.

item.title: Specialized Agents Beat General Ones
item.description: One AI that does everything is an AI that does nothing well. Here's how to build focused agents for code review, refactoring, and more.

item.title: Stop Prompting, Start Engineering
item.description: Most devs treat their AI like a glorified autocomplete. The real leverage is building systems around it... persistent context, specialized roles, and rules that evolve without you babysitting them.

item.title: The Personality File
item.description: Your AI assistant sounds like a customer support chatbot because you haven't told it not to. A single markdown file changes everything.

item.title: The AI Workspace Architect
item.description: How to initialize a new repository with persistent AI context in under 60 seconds.

item.title: The Tiered Rules Architecture
item.description: Stop putting everything in a single .cursorrules file. Modern AI workflows use a tiered approach to maximize accuracy while minimizing context window bloat.

item.title: Teach AI to Write Like You
item.description: If every message your AI drafts sounds like it was written by a polite robot, you need a voice guide. Here's how to build one that actually captures your patterns.
